prediction_fields.name: total_funding_sgd
prediction_fields.description: Total funding allocated by the government for AI R&D under NAIS 2.0

prediction_fields.name: max_co_funding_per_project_sgd
prediction_fields.description: Maximum co-funding amount available per 100E project

prediction_fields.name: available_gpu_hours
prediction_fields.description: Total compute capacity in GPU hours provided for AI experimentation

prediction_fields.name: trainer_personnel_count
prediction_fields.description: Number of AI experts and trainers assigned to support the programme

discussion_points: What is the total financial commitment for AI R&D?
What is the cap on government co-funding per project?
How much compute infrastructure is allocated to support AI experiments?
How many trainers are available to guide enterprises and practitioners?

prediction_fields.name: enterprise_outreach_sessions
prediction_fields.description: Number of outreach sessions conducted to engage enterprises for problem statement submission

prediction_fields.name: researcher_matchmaking_events
prediction_fields.description: Number of matchmaking events pairing researchers with enterprise challenges

prediction_fields.name: training_workshops_held
prediction_fields.description: Number of AI training workshops delivered to participating organizations

prediction_fields.name: platform_onboarding_assists
prediction_fields.description: Number of technical assistance sessions for onboarding onto the AI experimentation platform

discussion_points: How many enterprise outreach events were organized?
How many researcher–enterprise pairings were facilitated?
How many training workshops were conducted for the 100E programme?
What onboarding support was provided for the AI tools and platforms?

prediction_fields.name: approved_100e_projects
prediction_fields.description: Number of 100E projects approved for funding in 2023

prediction_fields.name: ai_prototypes_developed
prediction_fields.description: Number of AI prototypes built under the 100E programme

prediction_fields.name: trainees_completed_programme
prediction_fields.description: Number of individuals who completed the AI apprenticeship or training programme

prediction_fields.name: enterprises_with_solution
prediction_fields.description: Number of enterprises that have at least one AI solution developed through the programme

discussion_points: How many 100E projects received approval?
How many AI prototypes were successfully built?
How many trainees finished the programme?
How many enterprises now have an AI solution from the programme?

prediction_fields.name: number_of_100e_projects_approved_in_2023
prediction_fields.description: Number of 100E projects approved in 2023

prediction_fields.name: deployed_100e_projects
prediction_fields.description: Number of 100E projects completed and deployed into production in 2023

prediction_fields.name: ai_practitioner_pool
prediction_fields.description: Total number of AI practitioners in Singapore (target 15,000)

prediction_fields.name: generative_ai_use_cases
prediction_fields.description: Number of generative AI use cases developed (target 100 in 100 days)

prediction_fields.name: enterprise_ai_adoption_rate
prediction_fields.description: Percentage of enterprises adopting AI solutions in their operations

discussion_points: How many 100E projects have reached production deployment?
Is the AI practitioner pool approaching the 15,000 target?
How many generative AI use cases have been created?
What is the observed enterprise AI adoption rate?

prediction_fields.name: global_ai_readiness_rank
prediction_fields.description: Singapore's rank in global AI readiness indices (lower is better)

prediction_fields.name: ai_sector_gdp_share
prediction_fields.description: Estimated contribution of AI-related activities to GDP

prediction_fields.name: public_ai_trust_score
prediction_fields.description: Percentage of citizens expressing trust in AI systems deployed in public services

prediction_fields.name: ai_talent_retention_rate
prediction_fields.description: Proportion of AI talent remaining in Singapore after programme completion

discussion_points: Has Singapore improved its global AI leadership ranking?
What economic value is generated by AI adoption?
Does the public trust AI in government and business?
Is Singapore retaining its AI talent?
